{{Infobox madra
| name = Wind aura
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Wind aura Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wind [[aura]] is a natural energy aspect that manifests as a vivid green force, often visible to the naked eye as swirling gusts or [[emerald]]-colored winds. It can be perceived through [[spiritual sight]] as green light, swirls, or even a sun-like glow. This [[aura]] is highly versatile and can be manipulated by skilled artists to perform various functions, such as creating protective barriers, forming razor-sharp cyclones, or generating powerful walls of air. It is also used for mobility, allowing individuals to fly on currents of air, levitate, or drift as if floating on water. Beyond simple movement and defense, wind [[aura]] can be used offensively to bind enemies in chains of green energy, suck air from lungs, or create intense pressure to crush opponents. Advanced practitioners can use [[Ruler techniques]] to command the wind on a massive scale, such as summoning dark clouds or manipulating air pressure. The [[aura]] can also be combined with other elements; for instance, it can be infused with heat to create flaming gusts or integrated into specialized combat techniques. While wind [[aura]] is a fundamental aspect of the natural world, its control requires significant [[madra]] and can be influenced by [[soulfire]] or specific [[scripts]] to achieve greater precision and power.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Wind aura]] can be used to power weapons or fuel boundary formations.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Wind aura]] can be used to make objects drift on cushions of air.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] used wind [[aura]] to open the doors.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The silver bell's chimes sent wind [[aura]] rippling.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The iron plates are suspended on wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wind aura]] is present in the trees.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] uses wind [[aura]] to float a trunk.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Underlord]] used wind [[aura]] to control a falling box.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] manipulates wind [[aura]] to keep his eyes and mouth clear.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can use wind [[aura]] to manipulate objects.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wind aura]] can cushion a fall.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has the five-tailed snowfox bound up in wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] called [[Midnight]] with wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Ruler technique]] controlled the wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth’s Remnant]] was attempting to mimic wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wind aura]] is a strong, vivid green in the current location.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wind aura]] is used for propulsion.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Dreadgod]] takes control of the wind [[aura]] in the area.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] uses wind [[aura]] to summon dark clouds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] used wind [[aura]] to block sound.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
